title: hedysarum mauritanicum subsp. micrantum
intro: Hedysarum mauritanicum subsp. micrantum, also known as Micranthos, is a plant species within the subfamily Faboideae in the legume family (Fabaceae). It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, as well as its potential to treat various health conditions. The health benefits associated with Micranthos include reducing fever, alleviating cough and respiratory issues, and supporting the immune system, as well as having antimicrobial properties that can help combat infections. Traditionally, the plant is prepared as a tea or infusion, and its aerial parts are used in herbal preparations to harness its medicinal properties.
